{
  IPaymentService.PaymentServiceDecoratorOrder.g.cs:
using System;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    public static partial class PaymentServiceDecoratorOrder
    {
        public const int LoggingPaymentDecorator = 10;
        public const int MetricsPaymentDecorator = 20;
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.DecoratorGenerator
,
  IPaymentService.PaymentServiceDecoratorStack.g.cs:
using System;
using DesignPatterns.Structural;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    public static partial class PaymentServiceDecoratorStack
    {
        public static global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService Build(global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService core)
        {
            return new DecoratorStackBuilder<global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService>().Add<global::TestAssembly.LoggingPaymentDecorator>().Build(core);
        }

        public static ValueTask<global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService> BuildAsync(global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService core, global::System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(global::System.Threading.CancellationToken))
        {
            return new DecoratorStackBuilder<global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService>().Add<global::TestAssembly.LoggingPaymentDecorator>().Add((global::DesignPatterns.Structural.IAsyncDecorator<global::TestAssembly.IPaymentService>)new global::TestAssembly.MetricsPaymentDecorator()).BuildAsync(core, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.DecoratorGenerator

}
